signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]

This March figure, released around early April 2026, marks a modest acceleration amid contained pressures before Middle East conflict-driven energy volatility, staying near the Bank of Korea's 2% target.[1] No newer April data or announcements conf
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Iran Signals Peace Talks with US, Triggering Crypto Surge | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
Iran Signals Peace Talks with US, Triggering Crypto Surge | YES | HIGH**  
Bitcoin broke above $75,000 (up 5.9%), Ethereum jumped 8.6% to $2,377, XRP rose 4.2% to $1.38 (outperforming peers), and Solana gained 6.3% to $86.55 amid reduced Middle East war pressure.[1][2]

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Lists XRP Yesterday | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Lists XRP Yesterday | YES | HIGH**  
XRP up 4% to $1.41, leading Bitcoin/Ethereum/Solana, with institutional buying and upcoming SEC crypto roundtable adding momentum toward $1.45 resistance.[2]
